supported: a deterministic assembler from Stage 112 job results into Stage 109-compatible evidence files
optional provider-scoped evidence assembly for first-provider execution
per-job missing count detection before evidence files are written
a non-submitting bridge between provider runners and calibration/packet evidence intake

next_gate: Produce provider_job_results.jsonl for every selected Stage 112 job, rerun this assembler with --write-evidence, then run Stage 101, Stage 103, Stage 109, and Stage 110 in order.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
